languages.text: "Довольно стандартное начало бунта". {n}Соломон выглядит скучающим, но ствол дробовика, лежащий на его предплечье, как бы невзначай направлен на одноглазого.{/n} "Сначала они хотят "повысить эффективность", потом начинают таинственно пропадать те, кто с этим несогласен, и вот распоясавшиеся горожане уже вешают своего на первой же палубной балке".

"A fairly standard start to a mutiny." {n}Solomorne appears bored, but the barrel of the shotgun resting on his forearm is casually pointed at the one-eyed man.{/n} "First they want to 'increase efficiency,' then those who disagree begin to disappear, and now the rampaging locals are already stringing up their own from the nearest girder."
languages.original_text: "Довольно стандартное начало бунта". {n}Соломон выглядит скучающим, но ствол дробовика, лежащий на его предплечье, как бы невзначай направлен на одноглазого.{/n} "Сначала они хотят "повысить эффективность", потом начинают таинственно пропадать те, кто с этим несогласен, и вот распоясавшиеся горожане уже вешают своего на первой же палубной балке".

traits.locale_text: "A fairly standard start to a mutiny." {n}Solomorne appears bored, but the barrel of the shotgun resting on his forearm is casually pointed at the one-eyed man.{/n} "First they want to 'increase efficiency,' then those who disagree begin to disappear, and now the rampaging locals are already stringing up their own from the nearest girder."

"A fairly standard start to a mutiny." {n}Solomorne appears bored, but the barrel of the shotgun resting on his forearm is casually pointed at the one-eyed man.{/n} "First they want to 'increase efficiency,' then those who disagree begin to disappear, and now the rampaging locals are already stringing up their own from the nearest girder."

"A fairly standard start to a mutiny." {n}Solomorne appears bored, but the barrel of the shotgun resting on his forearm is casually pointed at the one-eyed man.{/n} "First they want to 'increase efficiency,' then those who disagree begin to disappear, and now the rampaging locals are already stringing up their own from the nearest girder."

languages.text: 「反乱の始まりとしては、かなり標準的なものだね。」{n}ソロモーンは退屈そうにしているが、彼の前腕に置かれたショットガンの銃口は、片目の男に向けられている。{/n}「まず『効率化』を望む。意見が合わない者は次々と消えていく。そして、暴徒化した地元民は、近くの梁に自らの仲間を吊るしている」
languages.original_text: "A fairly standard start to a mutiny." {n}Solomorne appears bored, but the barrel of the shotgun resting on his forearm is casually pointed at the one-eyed man.{/n} "First they want to 'increase efficiency,' then those who disagree begin to disappear, and now the rampaging locals are already stringing up their own from the nearest girder."

traits.locale_text: 「反乱の始まりとしては、かなり標準的なものだね。」{n}ソロモーンは退屈そうにしているが、彼の前腕に置かれたショットガンの銃口は、片目の男に向けられている。{n}「まず『効率化』を望む。意見が合わない者は次々と消えていく。そして、暴徒化した地元民は、近くの梁に自らの仲間を吊るしている。」

languages.text: “相当标准的兵变开场。”{n}索罗蒙显得有些无聊，但架在小臂上的霰弹枪枪口却看似随意地对着那个独眼男人。{/n}“起初，他们想要‘提高效率’；接着，反对者开始消失；而现在，这帮暴乱的土著已经开始把自家人往最近的钢梁上挂了。”
languages.original_text: "A fairly standard start to a mutiny." {n}Solomorne appears bored, but the barrel of the shotgun resting on his forearm is casually pointed at the one-eyed man.{/n} "First they want to 'increase efficiency,' then those who disagree begin to disappear, and now the rampaging locals are already stringing up their own from the nearest girder."

traits.locale_text: “相当标准的兵变开场。”{n}索罗蒙显得有些无聊，但架在小臂上的霰弹枪枪口却看似随意地对着那个独眼男人。{/n}“起初，他们想要‘提高效率’；接着，反对者开始消失；而现在，这帮暴乱的土著已经开始把自家人往最近的钢梁上挂了。”

languages.text: «Un comienzo estándar para un motín». {n}Solomorne parece aburrido, pero el cañón de la escopeta que descansa sobre su antebrazo está dirigido disimuladamente hacia el tuerto.{/n} «Primero quieren "aumentar la eficacia", luego las voces discordantes empiezan a desaparecer y ahora, en su furia, cuelgan a los suyos en la viga más cercana».
languages.original_text: "A fairly standard start to a mutiny." {n}Solomorne appears bored, but the barrel of the shotgun resting on his forearm is casually pointed at the one-eyed man.{/n} "First they want to 'increase efficiency,' then those who disagree begin to disappear, and now the rampaging locals are already stringing up their own from the nearest girder."

traits.locale_text: «Un comienzo estándar para un motín». {n}Solomorne parece aburrido, pero el cañón de la escopeta que descansa sobre su antebrazo está dirigido disimuladamente hacia el tuerto.{/n} «Primero quieren "aumentar la eficacia", luego las voces discordantes empiezan a desaparecer y ahora, en su furia, cuelgan a los suyos en la viga más cercana».

languages.text: "So startet man gemeinhin eine Meuterei." {n}Solomorne wirkt gelangweilt, aber der Lauf seiner auf seinem Unterarm ruhenden Schrotflinte ist beiläufig auf den einäugigen Mann gerichtet.{/n} "Zuerst wollen sie die 'Effizienz steigern', dann verschwinden alle, die anderer Meinung sind, und am Ende knüpfen die randalierenden Einheimischen ihre eigenen Leute am nächstbesten Balken auf."
languages.original_text: "A fairly standard start to a mutiny." {n}Solomorne appears bored, but the barrel of the shotgun resting on his forearm is casually pointed at the one-eyed man.{/n} "First they want to 'increase efficiency,' then those who disagree begin to disappear, and now the rampaging locals are already stringing up their own from the nearest girder."

traits.locale_text: "So startet man gemeinhin eine Meuterei." {n}Solomorne wirkt gelangweilt, aber der Lauf seiner auf seinem Unterarm ruhenden Schrotflinte ist beiläufig auf den einäugigen Mann gerichtet.{/n} "Zuerst wollen sie die 'Effizienz steigern', dann verschwinden alle, die anderer Meinung sind, und am Ende knüpfen die randalierenden Einheimischen ihre eigenen Leute am nächstbesten Balken auf."

languages.text: « Un début de mutinerie relativement ordinaire, » {n}annonce Solomorne sur un ton nonchalant, comme s'il s'ennuyait, mais le canon du fusil posé sur son avant-bras est pointé sur le borgne.{/n} « Ils commencent par raconter qu'ils veulent "optimiser l'efficacité", puis leurs opposants se mettent à disparaître et on finit par se retrouver avec un peuple enragé qui sème le chaos et exécute ses semblables. »
languages.original_text: "A fairly standard start to a mutiny." {n}Solomorne appears bored, but the barrel of the shotgun resting on his forearm is casually pointed at the one-eyed man.{/n} "First they want to 'increase efficiency,' then those who disagree begin to disappear, and now the rampaging locals are already stringing up their own from the nearest girder."

traits.locale_text: « Un début de mutinerie relativement ordinaire, » {n}annonce Solomorne sur un ton nonchalant, comme s'il s'ennuyait, mais le canon du fusil posé sur son avant-bras est pointé sur le borgne.{/n} « Ils commencent par raconter qu'ils veulent "optimiser l'efficacité", puis leurs opposants se mettent à disparaître et on finit par se retrouver avec un peuple enragé qui sème le chaos et exécute ses semblables. »

languages.text: "Bir isyan için oldukça standart bir başlangıç." {n}Solomorne sıkılmış görünüyor. Ön kolunda duran av tüfeğinin namlusu, gelişigüzel bir şekilde tek gözlü adama dönük.{/n} "Önce 'verimliliği artırmak' istiyorlar, sonra aynı fikirde olmayanlar ortadan kaybolmaya başlıyor. Şimdi de öfkeli yerliler kendi adamlarını en yakın kirişe asıyor."
languages.original_text: "A fairly standard start to a mutiny." {n}Solomorne appears bored, but the barrel of the shotgun resting on his forearm is casually pointed at the one-eyed man.{/n} "First they want to 'increase efficiency,' then those who disagree begin to disappear, and now the rampaging locals are already stringing up their own from the nearest girder."

traits.locale_text: "Bir isyan için oldukça standart bir başlangıç." {n}Solomorne sıkılmış görünüyor. Ön kolunda duran av tüfeğinin namlusu, gelişigüzel bir şekilde tek gözlü adama dönük.{/n} "Önce 'verimliliği artırmak' istiyorlar, sonra aynı fikirde olmayanlar ortadan kaybolmaya başlıyor. Şimdi de öfkeli yerliler kendi adamlarını en yakın kirişe asıyor."
